objections.summary: duckdb-pipe.ts collision — plan creates third write path instead of consolidating

evidence.detail: Existing write-capable execDuckDBWrite() with DuckDBWriteError. Committed at a1414d8c8. Not mentioned in plan. Post-plan coexistence of duckdb-pipe.ts + duckdb-exec.ts + (remnants in pipeline.ts/schema.duckdb.ts) creates up to 8 write-capable DuckDB execution paths.

objections.summary: Incomplete Effect.ignore removal — outer barrier persists

evidence.detail: Outer Effect.ignore wrapping entire forEach handler — NOT addressed by plan (only line 93 inner is covered)
Effect.ignore on runPipeline fiber guard — masks all pipeline errors
Effect.catchTag('DatabaseError', () => Effect.succeed([])) — silent swallow with no logging

objections.summary: Fragmented error types with no discrimination path

evidence.detail: After plan: DuckDBError (read path, db.duckdb.ts), DuckDBWriteError (unaddressed duckdb-pipe.ts), generic Error (new duckdb-exec.ts). Callers cannot use Effect.catchTag to discriminate DuckDB write failures. Report recommends standardizing on DuckDBWriteError.
startAllWorkers merges DuckDBProjectionWorker.layer but doesn't specify how DuckDBWrite.Service is provided
Layer.provide(DuckDB.layer) at tool composition level — plan doesn't specify where writeLayer's DuckDBConfig dependency is satisfied

objections.summary: duckdb-rank.ts is dead code — plan should acknowledge or remove

evidence.detail: All exports (rankWorkingSet, rankWorkingSetFull, queryCochange, queryAgentHeatmap, queryErrorFiles) have zero importers across src/ and test/. Plan's risk about 'duckdb-rank.ts must continue querying TABLE not VIEW' applies to dead code.

conditions_for_approval: Consolidate duckdb-pipe.ts: either merge execDuckDBWrite into the new duckdb-exec.ts and remove duckdb-pipe.ts, or use duckdb-pipe.ts as the shared foundation instead of creating duckdb-exec.ts. Do not create three parallel write paths.

Remove all remaining Effect.ignore barriers: address the outer barrier at duckdb-projection-worker.ts:96 and the fiber-level guard at pipeline.ts:246-247. Add structured logging to pipeline.ts:81 silent catchTag.
Standardize error type in duckdb-exec.ts: reject with DuckDBWriteError (from duckdb-pipe.ts) not plain Error. Enable Effect.catchTag('DuckDBWriteError', ...) discrimination.
Specify layer composition explicitly: detail where writeLayer is provided and how DuckDBConfig.Service is satisfied. Show updated workers/index.ts or tool/registry.ts changes.
Acknowledge duckdb-rank.ts dead code: file a follow-up to remove it, or add a reservation comment.

follow_up_issues.summary: Dead code: packages/opencode/src/context/duckdb-rank.ts — 237 lines of exported functions with zero importers
Error type audit: All DuckDB subprocess error paths use generic Error — consider DuckDBSubprocessError with _tag, exit code, stderr, and SQL fields
Layer composition refactor: Consider making DuckDBWrite.Service dependency explicit at workers/index.ts level rather than embedding Layer.provide inside the worker layer

groups.B: Remove duplicate exec functions from pipeline.ts and schema.duckdb.ts
groups.D: Projection worker changes (write client + error handling)

reversibility_graph.dependencies: C → B → (E or duckdb-pipe) → D → A. Fully serialized chain — no independent reordering possible.
reversibility_graph.narrowest_safe_revert: Either [(C)+(B)] as a pair, or [(D)+(A)] as a pair. Single-group revert always leaves broken architecture or dangling infrastructure.
